chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. H.C.A. No.25 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For orders as to non-prosecution As paper book not prepared as yet..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.10.2023 Ms. Sofia Saeed Shah, Advocate for the Appellant. Mr. Ch. Waseem Iqbal, Official Assignee..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. A question in relation to the fee of the Official Assignee arose in relation to which an order was passed. Perhaps 1% fee of the settled amount was claimed by the learned Official Assignee, however, the property was not auctioned but a fee was claimed. Learned single Judge was pleased to pass an order for recovery of the fee over an amount of Rs.90 million. It was urged by Ms. Sofia Saeed that since the property was not auctioned, requisite fee of 1% could not be paid and in fact fee could only be paid had the property been auctioned. Be that as it may, before the controversy could be resolved by us, it is settled out of Court and a statement to such an extent is filed with two attachments dated 02.09.2023 and 10.10.2023, which are taken on record. Things apparently have amicably settled and the Appeal is consigned to the Record. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
